Bus Timings

Al Ghubaiba Bus Station: Key Details for Your Dubai Commute

September 29, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Al Ghubaiba Bus Station is one of the most important transit hubs in Dubai, strategically located in Al Fahidi, serving thousands of commuters daily. Whether you’re heading to key destinations within the city or traveling to neighboring emirates, Al Ghubaiba offers a well-connected and efficient service. The station is designed to ensure convenience for passengers with a wide range of facilities and seamless access to major bus routes.

Address

Al Ghubaiba Rd Al Fahidi Dubai United Arab Emirates

View Google directions here.

Located in Al Fahidi, Al Ghubaiba Bus Station is a major transit hub in Dubai.

Bus Routes and Timings

Al Ghubaiba Bus Station is serviced by numerous bus routes, connecting travelers to various parts of Dubai and beyond. Below is a table of the major routes departing from the station:

Bus Route Bay Destination
29 1 Dubai Mall
44 2 Rashidiya
61 3 Samari Residences
C05 4 Gold Souq
N55 6 Al Maktoum Intl Airport
61D 6 Nadd Al Shiba Clinic
X13 7 Al Satwa
8 7 Ibn Battuta
E100 9 Abu Dhabi Central
E201 12 Al Ain
E306 14 Al Jubail, Sharjah
83 17 Nakheel Metro Station
91 19 Jabal Ali
33 21 Al Quasis
15 23 Al Khail Gate
21 25 Al Quoz Industrial Area 3 & 4
6 27 Oud Metha
X92 29 International City
12 43 Al Quoz
93 44 Mall of the Emirates Metro Station
9 45 Business Bay
X92 46 Dubai Investment Park 1
66 48 Al Faqa
67 49 Dubai Int’l Endurance City
95 50 Jabal Ali Waterfront

Bus Route Details

Al Ghubaiba Bus Station is a major transit hub, providing connections to various parts of Dubai and beyond. The station is serviced by numerous routes, ensuring frequent and reliable transport options. Key routes include:

  • 29: Connects to Dubai Mall from Bay 1.

  • 44: Serves Rashidiya from Bay 2.
  • 61: Travels to Samari Residences from Bay 3.
  • C05: Links to Gold Souq from Bay 4.
  • N55: Provides late-night service to Al Maktoum International Airport from Bay 6.
  • 61D: Connects to Nadd Al Shiba Clinic from Bay 6.
  • X13: Serves Al Satwa from Bay 7.
  • 8: Connects to Ibn Battuta from Bay 7.
  • E100: Provides service to Abu Dhabi Central from Bay 9.
  • E201: Travels to Al Ain from Bay 12.
  • E306: Links to Al Jubail, Sharjah, from Bay 14.

These routes operate throughout the day, offering flexible options for both early and late travelers. For real-time bus arrival information, passengers can SMS ‘D’ followed by the bus stop ID to 5223.

Facilities

  • Bicycle Parking

  • Food & Beverage Outlets
  • Mosque
  • Petrol Station
  • Police Station
  • Public Toilets
  • Restaurants: McDonald’s, Paradise Restaurant
  • Nol Card top-up services

Nearby Destinations

Al Ghubaiba Bus Station is strategically located near a variety of amenities, making it a convenient hub for commuters and travelers. From restaurants to government buildings, the area offers easy access to essential services and leisure activities.

Restaurants

  • Paradise Restaurant: Offers a diverse menu featuring international and local dishes.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Accommodation

  • Admiral Plaza Hotel: Provides comfortable accommodations with modern amenities.

  • Ambassador Hotel: A well-known hotel offering excellent service in the area.
  • Ascot Hotel: A cozy and convenient stay option for travelers.
  • Astoria Hotel: A comfortable hotel choice near the bus station.
  • Palm Beach Hotel: Offers a variety of amenities for guests.
  • Royal Ascot Hotel: Known for its premium service and facilities.

Government Buildings

  • Al Raffa Police Station: Ensures safety and security in the surrounding area.

  • Ministry of Finance: A key government office located nearby.

Healthcare

  • Al Raffa Health Centre: Provides essential healthcare services for the local community.

Heritage and Museums

  • Al Shindagha Historical District: A cultural landmark showcasing Dubai’s rich heritage.

  • Jumma and Obaid Bin Thani House: A historical museum offering insight into traditional Emirati life.
  • Sheikh Saeed Al Maktoum House: A museum preserving the history of Dubai’s ruling family.

Shopping Centers

  • City Centre Al Shindagha: A major shopping destination offering a range of retail outlets and dining options.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Ghubaiba Bus Station 3(10m): 8, N55, X13

  2. Al Ghubaiba Bus Station 12(32m): E201

  3. Al Ghubaiba Bus Station 14(33m): E306

  4. Al Ghubaiba Bus Station 9(45m): E100

  5. Al Ghubaiba Bus Station 17(88m): 15, 21A, 21B, 33, 83, 91, X23

Al Ghubaiba Bus Station is more than just a transit hub—it is a gateway to the vibrant heart of Dubai. Whether you’re commuting to work, running errands, or exploring the city’s cultural landmarks, Al Ghubaiba offers a seamless travel experience with a range of services and facilities to cater to your needs. Its strategic location and connectivity make it an essential stop for easy travel within Dubai and to neighboring emirates.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 29, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
